creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dup'ing per comment 12.  The underlying limit on type IDs is fixed in the main branch now.  In the meantime there have also been several kernel changes which fix inconsistencies leading to duplicate type IDs.  The most recent example is https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=b4f60fab5d3fdd2ea51c1151fa79b2c541c6b81a

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 232675 ***
